chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.238 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For hg of case 2.For hg of M.A. No.3491/25 23.01.2026. Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for applicant. Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Allah Ditta, advocate holding brief for Mr. Riaz Ahmed Bhatti, advocate for respondents No. 2 & 3. We have heard the parties at some length and dispose of this application with consent of applicant’s counsel by directing the trial Court to proceed with the trial, record evidence of the witnesses and pronounce judgment in three months without fail and submit such compliance report for perusal in Chamber through MIT-II of this Court. The Cr. Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
